test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition: Missing Peg/GI Info

description.scenario: Create a Purchase requisition using a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL). Ensure peg/GI information is missing. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected due to missing info.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected due to missing info and email is received stating rejection and reasons.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL
Check email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to PEG/GL info missing

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition: Blank BP/Employee Supplier

description.scenario: Create a Purchase requisition using a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL). Ensure business partner or employee supplier is blank. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected after buyer review.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected after buyer review and email is received stating rejection and reasons.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL
Ensure business partner or employee supplier is blank
Check email stating purchase requisition is rejected after buyer review

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition: SubConDefault Not Linked to Production Order

description.scenario: Create a Purchase requisition using a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL). Ensure SubConDefault item is not linked to any production order. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected with notification.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected with email notification stating SubConDefault not linked to production order.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL
Ensure SubConDefault item is not linked to any production order
steps.expected_result: SubConDefault item not linked to production order

steps.action: Check email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to SubConDefault not linked to production order

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition: Multi-line with Subcontracted Items

description.scenario: Create a Purchase requisition with multiple lines, one of which is a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL). Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected with notification.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected with email notification stating multi-line with subcontracted items.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with multiple lines, one of which is a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL)
Check email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to multi-line with subcontracted items

description.scenario: Create a standard purchase requisition with valid peg/GI information and business partner. Submit for approval. Check approval process completes without rejection.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition approved through BPMS015 without rejection.

steps.action: Create standard purchase requisition with valid peg/GI information and business partner
Check approval process completes without rejection
